response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive and diverse engineering experience across languages and domains, there is no meaningful evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling expertise — critical for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and historical, with no recent or substantial work on IDE internals, build tools, or application server integration as required.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No demonstrable recent or deep experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM internals
Lack of exposure to Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise IDE subsystems
Primary tech focus is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise tooling
